name: corporate-catering-system-contract-tooling
description: OpenAPI contract generation and typed client validation tooling

scripts.contract:sync: pnpm run contract:export && pnpm run contract:generate-client
scripts.contract:verify: pnpm run contract:sync && pnpm run contract:check-client && pnpm run contract:check-drift
scripts.release:verify: pnpm run contract:verify && pnpm run observability:verify
